title: Three players from Badgers selected doe CSA Hub Invitational Team
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Three players from the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Three players from the Garden Route Badgers were selected for the Hub Invitational Team competing in the 65th Oppenheimer Michaelmas Cricket Week from 4 to 7 October in Pietermaritzburg.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Three players from the Garden Route Badgers were selected for the Hub Invitational Team competing in the 65th Oppenheimer Michaelmas Cricket Week from 4 to 7 October in Pietermaritzburg."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The players are Kurt Botha (Rosemoor Hub; George High School), Keano Coerecius (Bridgton Hub; Bridgton Senior Secondary) and Enathi Kitshini (Thembalethu Hub; Thembalethu High School)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At the end of Michaelmas Week, the team that will participate in the North-South Cricket Tournament from 16 to 19 October in Pretoria will be announced.","html":"At the end of Michaelmas Week, the team that will participate in the North-South Cricket Tournament from 16 to 19 October in Pretoria will be announced."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The President at SWD Cricket, Micheal Eksteen, congratulated the players on their inclusion and complimented the hub cricket program in the province for its achievements.","html":"The President at SWD Cricket, Micheal Eksteen, congratulated the players on their inclusion and complimented the hub cricket program in the province for its achievements."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“SWD Cricket has a well-run and efficient hub development program and in the inclusion of three players from one province - the most from any affiliate - underlines the quality of the program,” he concluded.","html":"“SWD Cricket has a well-run and efficient hub development program and in the inclusion of three players from one province - the most from any affiliate - underlines the quality of the program,” he concluded."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Three players from Badgers selected doe CSA Hub Invitational Team
